title: Bakery Supply-Chain Recipe Trials
strategies: trivial: trial the single midpoint recipe budget-many times -> one cost point, dominates baseline volume only -> ~0.1
greedy: uniform grid over the two trade-off variables, distance vars at 0.5 (all on the cost frontier) -> spreads but grid is uneven on the curved frontier -> ~0.35

strong: uniform-grid seed + coordinate-wise local hypervolume ascent (multi-scale steps, keep only volume-increasing moves) -> reference-tuned spread, materially more volume, still short of global optimum -> ~0.48
